reviews.review_description: It’s a nice thing when you wanna relax and build a little bit. unfortunately it doesn’t save which is uncool but it’s a fun thing to use when you don’t own realmcraft

developer_response.body:
Hello there! Thank you for your review and feedback.

We have resumed development - and just shipped the save functionality to the game.

Regards,

Pointless Games.

Hello there!

We love you too.

Regards,

Pointless Games
